name: Brandub
author: AGP (traditional Irish tafl)
description: Brandub, the 7x7 Irish tafl. Asymmetric siege: the King and 4 defenders start on the central throne against 8 attackers ringing the edges (attackers move first). All pieces move like a rook. Men are captured by custodial flanking; the King must be surrounded on all four sides. Defenders win by escaping the King to a corner; attackers win by capturing the King.
